{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Incarnations’ prison
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Incarnations]]' prison is beginning to break.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
